name.en-US: Little Office of S. Anastasia, Martyr, Patroness and Wonderworker of the Exempt, Most Ancient, and Most Celebrated Monastery of Benediktbeuern

description.en-US: A traditional little office in honour of S. Anastasia, Martyr, Patroness and Wonderworker of the Exempt, Most Ancient, and Most Celebrated Monastery of Benediktbeuern, arranged in the canonical hours.

history.en-US: From a book of the same name published in 1702.
